ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deceased" (
  "deceased_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deceased individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the deceased */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the deceased */,
  "middle_initial" TEXT /* Middle initial of the deceased */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the deceased */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the deceased */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the deceased */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death of the deceased */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death of the deceased */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the deceased */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the deceased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deceased_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "burials" (
  "burial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each burial */,
  "deceased_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deceased individual */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plot where the deceased is buried */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section of the cemetery */,
  "interment_date" TEXT /* Date of interment */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., burial, cremation) */,
  "burial_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the deceased is buried */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of marker (e.g., headstone, flat marker) */,
  "marker_material" TEXT /* Material of the marker (e.g., granite, marble) */,
  "burial_permit_number" TEXT /* Number of the burial permit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("burial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_burials_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_burials_deceased_id FOREIGN KEY ("deceased_id") REFERENCES deceased ("deceased_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_burials_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section where the plot is located */,
  "plot_number" TEXT /* Plot number or identifier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plot (e.g., occupied, available) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plot */,
  "plot_size" TEXT /* Size of the plot */,
  "plot_material" TEXT /* Material of the plot (e.g., grass, concrete) */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plot */,
  "plot_features" TEXT /* Special features of the plot (e.g., bench, tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the cemetery section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cemetery section */,
  "section_size" TEXT /* Size of the section */,
  "section_material" TEXT /* Material of the section (e.g., grass, concrete) */,
  "section_features" TEXT /* Special features of the section (e.g., monuments, fountains) */,
  "section_rules" TEXT /* Specific rules or regulations for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "burial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the burial the document is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document or photograph */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., photo, document) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_size" TEXT /* Size of the document */,
  "document_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_burial_id FOREIGN KEY ("burial_id") REFERENCES burials ("burial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plot where maintenance was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person or team that performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "burial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the burial the service is for */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., funeral, cremation) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "service_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the service */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_burial_id FOREIGN KEY ("burial_id") REFERENCES burials ("burial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plot that is reserved */,
  "deceased_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deceased individual for whom the reservation is made */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  "reservation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reservation */,
  "reservation_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the reservation */,
  "reservation_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the reservation */,
  "reservation_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_deceased_id FOREIGN KEY ("deceased_id") REFERENCES deceased ("deceased_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff, family member, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "deceased_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deceased individual whose record was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the record was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the record was accessed */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_deceased_id FOREIGN KEY ("deceased_id") REFERENCES deceased ("deceased_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "burial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the burial the payment is for */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service the payment is for */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_burial_id FOREIGN KEY ("burial_id") REFERENCES burials ("burial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "burial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the burial the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice is due */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due on the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, outstanding) */,
  "invoice_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the invoice */,
  "invoice_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the invoice */,
  "invoice_payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_burial_id FOREIGN KEY ("burial_id") REFERENCES burials ("burial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "deceased_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deceased individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the deceased */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "contact_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_deceased_id FOREIGN KEY ("deceased_id") REFERENCES deceased ("deceased_id")
)
